description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On September 23, 2025 at 2:59 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a tow truck on Palou Avenue near Industrial Street.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling northwestbound on Palou Avenue and slowed to a stop to yield to a tow truck that stopped in the Waymo 
AV’s lane of travel. The Waymo AV momentarily proceeded forward, but came to a stop again as the tow truck began to reverse. While the 
Waymo AV remained stopped, the tow truck continued to reverse and the rear of the tow truck made contact with the front of the stationary 
Waymo AV. At the time of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained 
damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
